title: TritonAI Roadmap
description: A public, status-based view of TritonAI delivery from 2023 through 2026.
source: TritonAI strategy presentation and public product pages

items.title: Foundation and campus beta
items.summary: Established program funding, opened the campus beta, and introduced the first AI Essentials learning module.

items.title: Campus launch
items.summary: Launched TritonGPT for the campus workforce with single sign-on, file upload, and UC-hosted model options.
items.source: TritonAI strategy presentation and TritonGPT release notes

items.title: Student access and model choice
items.summary: Expanded access to students and added model choice, the website widget, AI search, and deeper research capabilities.
items.source: TritonAI strategy presentation and public release notes

items.title: Workflow pilots
items.summary: Tested transcript matching, instructional AI, contract review, scheduling support, and research-alignment workflows with human oversight.
items.owner: TritonAI solutions team and sponsoring units

items.title: Developer platform and integrations
items.summary: Opened Developer APIs, advanced Agent Builder, integrated current campus data, launched mobile-assistant and scheduling experiences, and expanded observability for supported services.
items.source: TritonAI 2026 roadmap and public developer pages

items.title: Harness, reusable agents, skills, and hosting
items.summary: Developing the TritonAI Harness, standardizing reusable skills and connectors, expanding governed agent delivery, and piloting a campus application-hosting lane.

items.title: Governed agency at campus scale
items.summary: Evaluating repeatable, supervised agent workflows that can use approved tools and connectors while retaining accountable human review.
items.owner: TritonAI program and campus governance partners
